design_philosophy: Authority, clarity, and function-first. The CRM must feel like a precision tool for a mechanic shop: highly structured, data-dense, and utilitarian. Form follows function. Minimal decoration. Color is used strictly for hierarchy and action.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid protocol. Dense and compact spacing for the data-heavy views. Generous padding only in the login view.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use 1px borders (border-zinc-200) instead of shadows for separation.
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-4, p-6 for cards; p-2 for table cells.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px to 4px). Sharp edges emphasize the mechanical, Swiss aesthetic.

components.buttons: Flat solid colors, no shadows, sharp corners or very subtle rounding (rounded-sm). Use primary accent (Red) for primary actions, Outline (zinc-200) for secondary.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs with square corners (rounded-none), light gray background on focus, sharp 1px borders.
components.tables: Dense rows, 1px bottom border per row, no vertical borders. Use IBM Plex Sans for tabular data.
components.sidebar: Dark mode sidebar (bg-zinc-950) for high contrast against the light mode main content area. Links should have a subtle hover state (bg-zinc-800).
components.cards: Border-collapse style layout or simple 1px borders with no shadow.

motion.strategy: Minimalist. Micro-interactions for button hovers and table row highlights. No bouncy or decorative animations.

icons.style: Regular or bold weight, representing precision.

images.description: Modern auto repair workshop - Use this as a dark-overlay background for the login screen.
Geometric abstract background - Can be used for empty states or secondary decorative areas.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Focus states must have high contrast (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-600 focus:ring-offset-1).
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='new-client-form'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter' or generic fonts for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body/tables.
Implement a dark sidebar (bg-zinc-950) with white text, and a light main content area (bg-white) to achieve the high-contrast Swiss look.
For the login page, use the 'login_background' image with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70) to ensure the login card stands out.
Do not use heavy shadows. Rely on 1px borders (border-zinc-200) for separating UI elements.

The 'Nuevos Clientes' form has 11 fields. Use a dense, multi-column grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) to avoid massive vertical scrolling. Group related fields (e.g., Address, Vehicle details).
The 'Fidelización' view should ideally use a Master-Detail pattern: a list of clients on one side (or search bar), and a detail panel for the calculator and invoice history on the other.
Use standard HTML inputs customized via Shadcn/Tailwind for forms, ensuring a dense, professional look.
Include 'data-testid' on ALL buttons, inputs, links, and key elements.
